positive: A stylized, geometric representation of a mountain range at sunrise. The mountains should feature sharp, layered silhouettes in deep indigo and slate grey, contrasted against a vibrant gradient sky of soft peach, dusty lavender, and warm gold. Include subtle, abstract constellations and celestial pathways as fine linework elements overlaying the scene. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, creating a strong, repeating pattern motif suitable for apparel. Minimalist illustration style, high contrast, flat graphic design aesthetic, vector art quality, clean lines, dramatic backlighting.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, low contrast, photorealistic, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grain, gradient artifacts
